property.name: javax.jdo.option.ConnectionURL
property.description: JDBC URL for the Hive metastore backend database

property.name: datanucleus.autoCreateSchema
property.description: DataNucleus will NOT auto-create schema. Schema is managed by schematool on IS_RESUME=false.

property.name: hive.metastore.schema.verification
property.description: Verify Hive schema version matches the running Hive version

property.name: hive.metastore.uris
property.description: Thrift URI for Spark and BI tools to connect to this metastore

property.name: hive.metastore.warehouse.dir
property.description: Default location for Hive managed tables

property.name: hive.metastore.event.db.notification.api.auth
property.description: Disable auth for metastore notification API (local dev)
